mapper.select: SELECT symbol, cik, ticker, company_name, source, fetched_at FROM stock_sec_company WHERE symbol = #{symbol}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_sec_company ( symbol, cik, ticker, company_name, source, fetched_at ) VALUES ( #{symbol}, #{cik}, #{ticker}, #{companyName}, #{source}, #{fetchedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE cik = VALUES(cik), ticker = VALUES(ticker), company_name = VALUES(company_name), source = VALUES(source), fetched_at = VALUES(fetched_at)
